title: Annual Thyagaraja Aradhana
description: A reverential tribute to the trinity of Carnatic music, featuring renditions of the Pancharatna Kritis by students and guest vidwans.

title: Navaratri Sangeetha Utsavam
description: Nine evenings of devotional music celebrating the divine feminine, with student recitals and invited artists performing rare kritis.

title: Guru Vandana — Annual Day
description: An evening dedicated to honouring our Gurus, featuring student performances showcasing their progress across all three pillars of our curriculum.

title: Margazhi Kutcheri Series
description: The sacred month of Margazhi brings our finest student performances in a week-long series of traditional Carnatic concerts.
